page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor built on the x86_64 architecture, delivering 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core tests placing the instance in the top 25% of its class. Multi-core performance is moderate, as shown by average scores in stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and PassMark memory tests. However, the instance exhibits performance limitations in specific workloads. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, PassMark database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput all fall into the bottom 25% tier.

The ecs.g8a.xlarge offers a balanced resource density for general-purpose workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. While its strong single-core capabilities benefit single-threaded processing and basic computational tasks, the lack of local storage and weaker database and web serving throughput make it less optimal for high-transaction databases or high-traffic web servers. It is recommended for general-purpose application hosting, lightweight background workers, and development environments that do not demand intensive multi-threaded scaling or high-speed local disk I/O.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM-based instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio, but includes no local storage or GPU resources. Network connectivity is limited to a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities, ranking in the top 25%, while multi-core and memory benchmarks remain average. However, the instance demonstrates weaker performance in database operations, Redis SET transactions, and static web serving throughput, which fall into the bottom 25%. Consequently, this instance is recommended for general-purpose computing, single-threaded processing tasks, and development environments rather than high-throughput database or web serving workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, showing strong single-core but weaker database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and strong single-core CPU performance.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance featuring balanced memory allocation and strong single-core processing for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with 4 dedicated physical cores and vCPUs at 2.7 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25% of benchmarks
No local storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps
Lower relative performance in database operations and static web serving
Appropriate for general-purpose computing, development environments, and single-threaded tasks
